scorebox.meta_text: Saturday September 14, 2024 , 15:00 (venue time) Premier League (Matchweek 4) Ipswich Town vs. Brighton & Hove Albion Historical Head-to-Head Attendance : 41,573 Venue : The American Express Stadium, Brighton & Hove Officials : Samuel Barrott (Referee) · Wade Smith  (AR1) · Akil Howson (AR2) · Leigh Doughty (4th) · Michael Salisbury (VAR)
